MEME Suite License
==================

Tool Name: MEME Suite (Multiple Em for Motif Elicitation)
License Type: BSD 3-Clause License
Copyright Holder: Regents of the University of California
Official Website: https://meme-suite.org/

License Features
---------------

The BSD 3-Clause license is a permissive open-source license that allows:
- Commercial use
- Modification
- Distribution
- Private use

The only obligations are:
- Preserve copyright notice
- Preserve license text
- Do not use copyright holder's name for promotion

Included Tools
--------------

MEME Suite tools included in TBtools:
- meme.exe - Motif discovery tool
- mast.exe - Motif search tool

Citation Information
--------------------

When using MEME Suite in academic research, please cite the following literature:

For MEME:

Bailey TL, Boden M, Buske FA, Frith M, Grant CE, Clementi L, Ren J, Li WW, Noble WS. (2009)
"MEME SUITE: tools for motif discovery and searching."
Nucleic Acids Res 37(Web Server issue):W202-208.

For MAST:

Bailey TL, Gribskov M. (1998)
"Combining evidence using p-values: application to sequence homology searches."
Bioinformatics 14(1):48-54.

Technical Notes
---------------

MEME Suite is a toolkit for motif analysis with main functions:
- Discover conserved motifs from a set of sequences (MEME)
- Search known motifs in sequence databases (MAST)
- Motif enrichment analysis
- Motif visualization and annotation

MEME Suite has wide applications in:
- Transcription factor binding site identification
- Protein domain analysis
- Gene regulatory network research
- Evolutionary analysis
